'''Kvabja''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] which was ruled over by a monarch called a [[Mrahash]]. Presumably, the Mrahash and the planet itself had little military power during the time of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], and was controlled by a [[Drach'nam]] named [[Chay Praysh]] and his slaver consortium. Praysh didn't dwell on Kvabja, though, and lived in his headquarters on the planet [[Torpris]].
